titleStmt.title: SII 38.424: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 424. (A.R. No. 424 of 1912.) VAḺUVŪR, MAYAVARAM TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT. On the west wall, maṇḍapa Vīraṭṭānēśvara temple.

p.hi: King: Pratapadēva[rāya Mahādēva] Year: Śaka, pramāti, Mīna, Pañchami, Sadayam.

summary.p: Built in at the right end. It appears that when the temple Tiruvīraṭṭānamuḍaiyanāyanār temple was dilapidated, a person Chellapiḷḷaiyār Śedarāyan had reconstructed the agaramaṇḍapa (front hall), nirttamaṇḍapa (dance-hall) and snapanamaṇḍapa (bath hall) of the above temple. He also excavated a tank and a channel. He is said to have pledged his six vēli of land with the temple officials for 220 paṇam, and utilised the money for the renovation and repair of the temple annually. Besides this, two veli of land was also mortagaged for 100 paṇam to renovate Iḍareḍutta Perumāḷ temple. It is further recorded that on receipt of the mortagage deed (after the redemption of the land) the two vēli of land were allotted for the purpose of renovation of the above Perumāḷ temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrīmanmagāmaṇḍalīśvaran hariha
ṣaikku tappuvarā(ā)yar kaṇṭaṉ muvara
ṉāṭu koṇṭu koṇṭaṉāṭu kuṭātāṉ pū
Uttara samudrātipati śrīpradāpateva
virājyam paṇṇiaruḷā niṉṟa cakādam
llā niṉṟa pramātivaruṣam miṉanāyaṟṟu ca
ḻamaiyum pañcami peṟṟa catayattunā
vaḻukūr ṉāyaṉār tiruvīraṭṭāṉamuṭaiya nāya
muṉṉāḷ copakiṟivaruṣa varaiyum ne
yakkiṭaṉ(na)tapaṭiāle Ivūr kotiRead krotivaruṣamu
kkālum veṭṭuvittu Ēriyum kaṭṭuvittu tiru
l Āka Agramaṇṭapam niṟttamaṇṭapam snamaṇama
Aṭittaḷam Aḷavu Āka paṟittu tīntu tirumalaiyum
tiruvācalum kaṭṭait tiruvācal Āka camai
l Aṭittu vakkam Āka camaippittu teṟkil
ṭṭu Aḷavu Āka tīruvittu Inta tiruppaṇikaḷ
cellappiḷḷaiyār cetarāyar tanmam
vukku tāṉattārppakkal rulaRead nilaOṟṟi Āka piṭitta
m Oṟṟi piṭitta rulamRead nilaAṟuvelikkut tāṉattā
1 2 100 2 10 Iṟpaṇairunūṟṟu Irupatukkum tat
yum kuṭuttuviṭṭa Aḷavukku Inta InrulamRead nilaAṟuve
tiruppaṇic celavukku varuṣamtoṟum I
Itu rūñkalniṅkal ākaĀka perumāḷ Iṭareṭuttaperumāḷ taru kaḷuc
kuppaiyile Iḷantevaṉ kuṭi pirāmaṇaṉār mutaliyār Oṟṟi piṭitta rūlamRead nilaĀ
ṇṭu rulaRead nilaOṟṟi Āka piṭittu kuṭutta rulaRead nilaUliMay be read as 2 veli.Inta rulamRead nila Iruvelikku Oṟṟikku kā
k koṇṭa 1 100 Iṟpaṇam nūṟṟukku Iṭṭa Oṟṟi muṟiyum tantuviṭṭa Aḷavukku Inta rulaRead nila
Iruveliyum perumāḷ koyil tiruppaṇiccelavukku Iṭṭu naṭatti koḷḷavum
